title: Fix Market Data LIVE zeroed values

requirements.text: Fix the Market Data LIVE section so that Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy Levels, and Sell Levels display real values instead of dashes or zeros. The issue is that the ICDex quote/order-book fetch is failing silently; add proper error surfacing and a retry/fallback so the UI shows either a live value or a clear error message rather than blank dashes.

quotes:
Mid Price (ICP/ckUSDT)—
Best Bid—
Best Ask—
Buy Levels0
Sell Levels0
vamos tentar essa abordagem tente corrigir a área de Market Data

acceptanceCriteria: MarketDataPanel displays a non-zero Mid Price when the ICDex canister is reachable.
Best Bid and Best Ask show formatted price values instead of dashes.
Buy Levels and Sell Levels show a count greater than zero when the order book is populated.
If the ICDex fetch fails, an explicit error message (not silent dashes) is shown in the panel.
The panel retries the data fetch automatically on a polling interval consistent with the existing LIVE indicator.

requirements.text: In the backend, ensure the query function that retrieves market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) from the ICDex canister returns a structured error variant when the external call fails rather than returning zero/null silently. Log the failure to the activity log so the operator can diagnose the root cause.

quotes: a chamada ao ICDex para buscar cotações (getQuotes ou level10) está falhando silenciosamente

acceptanceCriteria: The backend query for market data returns a Result or variant type that distinguishes success from failure.
A failure from the ICDex canister call is caught and its description is appended to the activity log.
Zero values are never returned when the underlying call failed; an error variant is returned instead.

constraints: Changes must be minimal and focused — do not refactor unrelated panels or hooks.
Do not alter the bot start/stop logic or order management code.
Keep the single-actor Motoko architecture intact.
nonGoals: Redesigning the dashboard layout or other panels.
Changing authentication or Internet Identity integration.
